title: netherite horse  armor texture
description: Changes the Iron horse armor to the netherite texture. 46a and 45a as choice
body:
very simple resource pack that changes (Iron) existing horse armor (and item logo) to netherite texture from 25w45a.


![netherite horse armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yTgcUcdV/images/6db9060992c21d10bc2a683e1df96f6a3ca33cee.png)


(only texture not stats) (works on older version all the way to 1.14 version make sure for older version you use 3.0 version as 2.0 and 1.0 wont work)

right now its changing Iron armor but its very easy to edit which texture you want to change.

to change diffrent texture for example gold: (version 1.0 and 2.0 only) 

(Read Changelog for guide on 3.0 version)

open the following:

horse.zip\assets\minecraft\textures\entity\equipment\horse_body 

now all you do is delete gold.png file ,copy paste the Iron. png file and rename it to gold.png (then delete the old Iron.png)

the changes are only cosmetic and dont affect stats.

it is possible to add custom pixel art to the sides of the texture as shown in parrot example:
any colour can be made as shown in the yes example.


(because it is a resource pack it can work without any mod loaders and has higher compatibility)

I figured out if adding parrots logo is possible then adding banners or capes is not hard either, I tried it out and it works as expected. (this can be done on all horse armor, and any cape or banner is supported)
to do this do same steps as parrot logo example but make sure the cape or banner fits the area correctly, delete any wrong pixels and change color to fit the armor you are editing.
